name: Insolvent Bank Tax Exemption

eligibility.description: Applies to banks or trust companies where a substantial portion of business is receiving deposits and making loans, and the bank has ceased business due to insolvency or bankruptcy.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts insolvent banks and trust companies from the assessment or collection of federal taxes if such payment would diminish assets necessary for the full payment of depositors.
